title: Crystal Clarity
description: Visibility boost pack with low fire, cleaner shield, clear water and less screen clutter.
body:
Crystal Clarity is a **vanilla-friendly visibility pack** that **removes annoying visual clutter** so you can actually see what’s happening in your game. It keeps Minecraft looking **natural** while making **survival** and **PvP** way easier.

This pack reduces screen obstructions like fire, shields, rain & snow, underwater fog, pumpkin blur, and more, giving you a clean gameplay experience without breaking immersion.

What it does:
- Low Fire – fire covers less of your screen
- Smaller Shield – reduced shield size when held and blocking
- Clear Water Vision – better underwater visibility
- Powder Snow Fix – less screen freeze overlay
- Cleaner Pumpkin Blur – see more with carved pumpkins
- Reduced Rain & Snow – weather is less distracting
- Transparent Shadows – softer and cleaner shadow textures
- Clear Spyglass Zoom – see farther without heavy overlays

Why download it:

If you hate having half your screen blocked by fire or your shield, or you're tired of ugly fog and blur effects, this pack instantly fixes that while staying 100% vanilla-friendly.

Compatibility:
- FPS-friendly – no performance impact
- Works with most texture packs (place it above other packs)

Clean visuals. Better awareness. No distractions — Crystal Clarity.
